raw_consumer_statement: Several payment made on my Macy 's credit card that I did not make in XX/XX/XXXX. I filed a fraud report, and closed the account. I received no further information. I then received an email in XX/XX/XXXX saying that the account is overdue, from both Macy 's and a credit agency. I called Macy 's. They cut me off 4 times in the space of two hours. They still have not resolved the problem. My perfect credit history is at risk and they have cause significant mental distress.
